ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT AINSWORTH, TANDRA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TANDRA AINSWORTH'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. TANDRA AINSWORTH HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TANDRA AINSWORTH'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. TANDRA AINSWORTH HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
FIRST APPEARANCE FEES (WAIVER DENIED) FILED BY DEFENDANT AINSWORTH, TANDRA
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FEES PAID BY TANDRA AINSWORTH ON 04/13/O7.
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: FEES PAID BY DEFT, TANDRA AINSWORTH AND THERE IS NOTHING ELSE TO STRIKE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
